name: Production Docker Setup
description: Create a production-grade Dockerfile and Docker Compose setup. Multi-stage build (deps → builder → runner), non-root user, health checks, .dockerignore, and docker-compose with Postgres and Redis.

steps.description: Read start script and Node version requirement
Multi-stage: deps (npm ci --frozen-lockfile), builder (npm run build), runner (node:alpine, non-root user, COPY from builder)
Compose with app (healthcheck), postgres:16-alpine (with healthcheck), redis:7-alpine, named volumes
Production override: restart: unless-stopped, no bind mounts, resource limits
Build production image and verify it works
